description_long: This storage box is constructed from dark, weathered wooden planks, giving it a rustic and robust appearance suitable for outdoor or garage use. The box features a rectangular, cubic form with visible wood grain and some signs of aging, such as slight discoloration and rough texture. Each side is framed with horizontal and vertical wooden slats, reinforcing the structure and adding to its durability. The top surface appears to be a solid, flat wooden lid, seamlessly integrated with the rest of the box, but there are no visible hinges or handles. The coloration varies between deep brown and lighter, faded wood tones, suggesting exposure to the elements. There are no visible labels, locks, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A sturdy, weathered wooden storage box with a rustic, utilitarian design and a flat, solid lid. The box features dark and light brown wood tones with visible grain and reinforced framing.
description_view_0: This view shows a dark, weathered wooden side with pronounced grain and a solid, framed structure.
description_view_1: This side is lighter in color, with more faded wood planks and less pronounced grain, framed by horizontal slats.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side is dark and robust, with visible wood texture and reinforced edges.
description_view_3: This view displays the lightest wood coloration, with vertical planks and subtle greenish discoloration, framed by horizontal slats.
